title: ranunculus subangustifidus
intro: Ranunculus subangustifidus, also known as the narrow-leaved ranunculus or narrow-leaved buttercup, is a plant species in the genus Ranunculus. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting potential antioxidant and antiviral effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
